name: Potato Vegetable Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups carrots, cut into 1/2 inch cubes
2 lbs potatoes, cut into 1/2 inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook carrots in boiling water for 3 minutes.
2. Add potatoes; bring to a boil, and cook for 10 minutes or until tender.
3. Drain. Place carrots, potatoes, green peas, and onions in a mixing bowl; set aside.
4. In another mixing bowl, combine sour cream, mayonnaise, mustard, vinegar, black pepper, and salt.
5. Stir well with a wire whisk.
6. Pour over vegetable mixture; toss gently to coat.
7. Cover and chill 8 hours.
